results.title: Learn Postman for API Testing (Step-by-Step Tutorial)
results.reason: Highly rated for its 'zero to hero' approach with a structured timeline that viewers frequently cite as the most helpful for absolute beginners.
summary: How to send requests to a server
Ways to test if data is correct
Organizing your work into simple folders
Running many tests automatically at once

results.title: Session1: Introduction to API Testing
results.reason: Excellent foundational coverage of client-server architecture and HTTP basics, which viewers praise for setting a strong theoretical base.
summary: What an API is and how it works
The basic parts of a web request
Understanding different types of server responses
Why we test software behind the scenes

results.title: Session 1: API Testing | RestAssured | Introduction | Environment Setup | HTTP Methods
results.reason: The gold standard for Java-based API automation, focusing on environment setup and Maven which is critical for professional testing.
summary: Setting up your computer for coding tests
Creating, reading, updating, and deleting data
Writing your first automated test script
Connecting different tools to work together

results.title: REST API Crash Course - Introduction + Full Python API Tutorial
results.reason: Great for those wanting a Python-centric approach; explains the 'why' behind REST principles better than most QA-specific channels.
summary: The rules for how web services talk
Building a simple API using Python code
Storing and retrieving information from a database
How to design a clean web system

results.title: Part 1: Building API Automation Testing Framework in Rest Assured from from Scratch
results.reason: High-quality framework building content, though the 'from scratch' aspect may be slightly fast-paced for a true beginner.
summary: Building a professional testing system from scratch
Making code easy to reuse and change
Handling complex data in a simple way
Creating clear reports for your test results
